pageContext.name: Super Saiyan God Super Saiyan Gogeta
pageContext.description: From the hit 1995 theatrical anime Dragon Ball Z: Fusion Reborn comes the fusion of Goku and Vegeta, the ultimate Super Saiyan Gogeta! And now he's also appeared in the film Dragon Ball Super: Broly, in a never-before-seen God Super Saiyan form! This anime figure has it all, from the nostalgia factor of a beloved character to an all-new appearance from his latest film!
